title: Key Combinations and Caps Lock not passing through if using mRemoteNG through TeamViewer
author: strajk-
body_snippet:
## Expected Behavior
Copy and Paste using key combination or any other command such as WIN+E, writing with caps lock or using shift to write in upper case letters should work using TeamViewer -> mRemoteNG
In both applications the setting is enabled to have them passthrough.

## Current Behavior
No key combinations work and even if caps lock is enabled it will still not write in upper case.

## Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)
1. Connect to PC which will have mRemoteNG installed with TeamVie...

iterations.description: No reproducible steps, logs, or confirmation this affects the current fork build; issue only has legacy version labels and a stale triage comment requesting retest.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `6c110776` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Key Combinations and Caps Lock not passing through if using 

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

notes:
AI triage (claude): No reproducible steps, logs, or confirmation this affects the current fork build; issue only has legacy version labels and a stale triage comment requesting retest.
Approach: Request reporter to retest on latest build and provide reproducible steps, expected vs actual behavior, and logs/screenshots before implementing any fix.
